text: The luminous, sterile environment of this research space makes me feel both inspired and uncertain. The vivid orange and blue walls, along with the showcased innovations, seem to celebrate human progress and the drive to understand our world through development and experimentation. Yet, the intensity of the clean lines, glass, and technology lends a sense of detachment—almost as if I am observing humanity's future from a slight distance, not fully rooted in any one reality. There is anticipation here—a tension between curiosity and unfamiliarity, beckoning me to reflect on my place in this ongoing evolution of knowledge.
